_comment: Merge into site_config.json on Frappe Cloud (Site → Configuration). No secrets in git.
lms_risk_disclosure: Loans involve credit risk. Terms and fees apply.
_comment_footer: Set lms_brand_footer_text to "" to hide the portal footer. Omit it to default to Powered by {lms_brand_portal_title}.
_comment_idle: Portal idle auto-logout (minutes). Warning appears ~2 minutes before. Set 0 to disable.
